title: koeleria albescens subsp. maritima
intro: Koeleria albescens subsp. maritima, also known as the coastal koeleria or sea hair grass, is a subspecies of grass native to coastal areas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria albescens subsp. maritima include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a valuable resource for herbal medicine.
